name: Rory, the Berserker
description:
The gold-loving leader of the "Dog Knights", a group of mercenaries from the harsh lands of Vargraya, a land filled with beasts and beastmen alike. She makes a living by doing odd jobs, hunting creatures, and exploring dungeons. If it can turn in a profit, she's most likely there to do so.

Fandom: Dog Knight RPG

Artist: Furbooru - CeeHaz

Please favorite and leave a feedback to support my work. For further information, check my profile.
